text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I know this is a little sudden, but I have something
to ask you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I want you to go to the NHK Mile Cup with me!
Not just to watch! I want you to run with me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! Why not?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: At this rate... I'll...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Can you come with me to the training track for a
sec?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Surprised by her odd request, I nevertheless
follow her to the training track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There we find...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Graaaagh! I'm not gonna lose, Sei!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Then keep up with me... Push yourself to the limit!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I was so close...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... I win!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Wheeze, wheeze... That's right—I'll train until I drop! This is all for my first-rate comeback at the Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, there's still a lot of work to be done until
then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her rivals are all working hard together.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Look at them! The passion! The nobility! The witty
comebacks and friendly teasing!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Just watching them makes my blood tingle! I want
rivals like that!
choice_data_list: You mean they're not your rivals?
You mean they're not your rivals?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Of course, they're my rivals. But they're all on the
Triple Crown tour, and I'm on my own path.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
My papa told me that when luchadors use
jumping techniques...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Each one tries to fly higher than the others. They
use that passion to make even better techniques.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But I don't have anyone to compete with...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
How can I go on like this? Can this even be called
wrestling?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: So how about it, Trainer? Will you run with me?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Then what about a winning wrestling match at
least?
choice_data_list: I don't really know what to say...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Then, what should I do?! Look at me! Look at
these balled fists, clenched like iron!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa seems sad that she doesn't have
any rivals to go toe-to-toe with.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As far as solutions, only one comes to mind...
choice_data_list:
Do you want to change to the Triple Crown
tour?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué? N-no, that's out of the question.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
My goal is and always has been to win the Japan
Cup in my classic year!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The dreams of the world's wild condor will never
waver!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But... I do also want to run with my rivals! What
should I do...
choice_data_list:
Is there any reason you can't run with them next
year?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's true! There's always next year...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ughhh, but that's too far away! I wanna race them
as soon as possible.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh, I've got it! In that case...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
King! King! Wanna go to the NHK Mile Cup with
me?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You know, just for a laugh... Really kill some time!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! Don't be ridiculous! Absolutely not!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa's hot young blood is looking for a
challenge. I could try and tell her not to be
unreasonable, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is what she wants, and who am I to say no? I
wonder if there's way she can test her strength
against her classmates, at least once.
